evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Address data consistency issues across RDB and NoSQL sources
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Rigour-leaning signals (data consistency, query optimization, architecture design) are present with no explicit speed/shipping language.
evidence.domain_risk: helps global brands identify and remove counterfeits and pirated content from over 1,500 platforms across 118 countries
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Brand protection/counterfeit detection affects business outcomes for client brands but carries no financial reporting or regulatory compliance language.
evidence.data_team_maturity: Lead initial architecture design for new analytics platform implementation
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: The explicit framing of leading "initial architecture design for new analytics platform implementation" signals the data function/platform is being newly established.
evidence.jd_authorship: Deep understanding of SQL (PostgreSQL, Snowflake, BigQuery, etc.)
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Specific database and tool names (RDB/NoSQL, PostgreSQL, Snowflake, BigQuery, Airflow) give a concrete picture of daily technical work.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Design data marts for company metrics and automated ad-hoc analysis
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The role centres on internal data marts, metrics, and BI platform collaboration rather than a specific external commercial or finance function.
evidence.autonomy_level: Lead initial architecture design for new analytics platform implementation
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: "Lead initial architecture design" is explicit direction-setting language for a new platform, indicating strategic autonomy.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No AI tool or AI infrastructure mention appears anywhere in the extracted JD text.
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: No testing, data quality framework, or data contract language appears; data consistency work is framed as engineering troubleshooting, not a testing practice.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: The JD is framed in delivery and architecture-building terms with no risk or compliance register.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Lead initial architecture design for new analytics platform implementation
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Explicit "initial architecture design for new analytics platform" language signals greenfield infrastructure building.
